docproj-13-itstool22.patch

There is an issue with version >=2.0.5 and it is impacting the translation
efforts of FreeBSD [1][2] with the PO system.

1 - https://github.com/itstool/itstool/issues/38
2 - https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=224903
